title: 70 Pcs Food Storage Freezer Bags, 3 Sizes Zip Lock Bags (4.55L, 2.27L, 1L), Reusable Ziplock Bags Sandwich Bags with Expandable Bottom, Heavy Duty Food Bags for Fruits, Veggies, Meat, Snacks
features: 【Package Includes】This zip lock bags set includes 25 pcs (1 box) large food bags, 25 pcs (1 box) medium food bags, and 20 pcs (1 box) small food bags, totaling 70 pcs (3 boxes), with sufficient quantity and diverse sizes to meet your different needs.
【Reliable Material】Our reusable food storage freezer bags are made of PE material and can come into direct contact with food, thick and durable.
【Zip Lock Seal Design】This food storage bag adopts a zip lock sealing design, which is easy to open and seal, making it more convenient to operate and use.

【Expandable Bottom】The reusable ziplock bag features a widened bottom design, which not only increases the capacity of the food bag but also makes it easier to stand when the bag is full, making the refrigerator storage neater.

【Writable Area】The resealable ziplock bag design has a writable area, so you can mark the storage date, item name, and other information. Zip lock bags can not only be used to store vegetables, fruits, meat, sandwiches, and other foods, but also to store toiletries, cosmetics, and more during travel.
description: Product Description Zip Lock Bags Zip Lock Bags Zip Lock Bags Zip Lock Bags Freezer Bags Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 711 4.7 out of 5 stars 711 4.7 out of 5 stars 711 4.4 out of 5 stars 281 4.4 out of 5 stars 543 Price £9.24 £ 9 . 24 £11.03 £ 11 . 03 £8.39 £ 8 . 39 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £9.34 £ 9 . 34 Packaging Quantity 50 Pcs（2 Boxes） 50 Pcs（2 Boxes） 50 Pcs（2 Boxes） 60 Pcs（3 Boxes） 70 Pcs（3 Boxes） Size One Size（2.27L） One Size（4.55L） One Size（1L） Three Sizes（L, M, S） Three Sizes（L, M, S） Seal Zip Lock Seal Zip Lock Seal Zip Lock Seal Zip Lock Seal Double Strand Seal BPA Free ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Heavy Duty ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Expandable Bottom ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ - no data Food Storage Freezer Bags Specifications: Material: PE Size: As Shown Color: Transparent Package include: 70*Zip Lock Bags（L: 25PCS, M: 25PCS, S: 20PCS） Our zip seal food bag can withstand a temperature range of minus -20-110 ℃, which can be heated in Water heating or thawed by microwave (the time should not exceed 3 minutes). Tips: When heating in Water heating or thawing in the microwave oven, please open the bag mouth to reserve a gap to facilitate the discharge of water vapor. The sandwich bags are packaged in a box and features a pull-out bag taking design, making it convenient and fast to take out the bag. The transparent material of the zip seal food storage bag makes the food inside clearly visible and easy to access.
